title: The Zambia Institute of Advanced Legal Education (Amendment) Act, 2021

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Zambia Institute of Advanced Short title
sections.body:
Legal Education (Amendment) Act, 2021, and shall be read as one
with the Zambia Institute of Advanced Legal Education Act, in this Cap. 49
Act referred to as the principal Act.
2. Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the insertion of Amendment
the following new definition in the appropriate place in alphabetical of
section 2
order:
“Zambia Qualifications Authority” means the Zambia
Qualifications Authority established under the Zambia Act No. 13
Qualifications Authority Act, 2011. of 2011
3. Section 4 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
(a) deletion of paragraph (e); of
section 4
(b) deletion of paragraph (f) and the substitution therefor
of the following:
(f) recommend to the Zambia Qualifications Authority,
accreditation and recognition of minimum
required courses to be completed as part of
qualifications of foreign students who wish to
be enrolled as students of the Institute;; and
(c) renumbering of paragraphs (f), (g), (h), (i), (j), (k), (l)
and (m) as paragraphs (e), (f), (g), (h), (i), (j), (k) and
(l), respectively.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
